ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from a central reference point (e.g., state capital) */,
  "num_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools in the district */,
  "statewide_rank" TEXT /* Statewide rank of the district */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the district (0-5 scale) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the district belongs to */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the district */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the district was established */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the district's information */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Geographical area of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the school belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., elementary, middle, high) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "enrollment_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the school can enroll */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the school's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Current grade level of the student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the student is enrolled in */,
  "home_address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "parent_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the student's parents or guardians */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "special_needs" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student has any special needs */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the student's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., teacher, principal, admin) */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the staff member works at */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the staff member works in */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications the staff member holds */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the staff member */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the staff member's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school offering the course */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher teaching the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the course information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student in the course */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Attendance percentage of the student in the course */,
  "midterm_grade" TEXT /* Midterm grade of the student in the course */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the enrollment information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the financial data */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated */,
  "expenditure" REAL /* Total expenditure */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding (e.g., state, federal, local) */,
  "funding_allocation" TEXT /* Details of how the budget was allocated */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last financial audit */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of the program (e.g., academic, extracurricular) */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district implementing the program */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school implementing the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the program */,
  "participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the program */,
  "outcomes" TEXT /* Outcomes or results of the program */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the program information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the performance metric (e.g., test scores, graduation rates) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the performance metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the performance metric data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the performance metric information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., admin, educator, researcher) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the role information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the user information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
